dict.string: 一键屏蔽/解封娱乐视频网站（含B站、油管、抖音、腾讯、爱奇艺、优酷等）
切换开启或关闭学习模式

set shellCmd to " # Clash 控制 API 端口，默认为 9090 (ClashX/ClashX Pro)。如果不同，请按需修改。 CLASH_API='http://127.0.0.1:9090' GROUP_NAME='YouTubeControl'
if grep -q '# KIDS_MODE_START' /etc/hosts; then # 解封本地 hosts sed -i '' '/# KIDS_MODE_START/,/# KIDS_MODE_END/d' /etc/hosts dscacheutil -flushcache killall -HUP mDNSResponder
# 解封 Clash YouTube if [ -f /tmp/clash_yt_state ]; then PREV=\$(cat /tmp/clash_yt_state) curl -s -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d \"{\\\"name\\\":\\\"\$PREV\\\"}\" \"\$CLASH_API/proxies/\$GROUP_NAME\" > /dev/null fi
echo '✅ 娱乐网站已解封，可以放松一下了。' else # 屏蔽本地 hosts (国内视频) echo '# KIDS_MODE_START' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 www.bilibili.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 bilibili.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 search.bilibili.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 www.douyin.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 douyin.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 v.qq.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 www.iqiyi.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 iqiyi.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 www.youku.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '127.0.0.1 youku.com' >> /etc/hosts echo '# KIDS_MODE_END' >> /etc/hosts
# 屏蔽 Clash YouTube CURRENT=\$(curl -s \"\$CLASH_API/proxies/\$GROUP_NAME\" | grep -o '"now":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4) if [ ! -z \"\$CURRENT\" ] && [ \"\$CURRENT\" != \"REJECT\" ]; then echo \"\$CURRENT\" > /tmp/clash_yt_state curl -s -X PUT -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"name\":\"REJECT\"}' \"\$CLASH_API/proxies/\$GROUP_NAME\" > /dev/null fi
dscacheutil -flushcache killall -HUP mDNSResponder echo '🚫 学习模式已开启，视频网站已被屏蔽。' fi " set actionResult to do shell script shellCmd with administrator privileges return actionResult
